'''Hassla'tak''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Helm officer/Legends|helmsman]] of the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
